title: Alienmon [Cobblemon]
description: Catch the Alien Xenomorph in Minecraft Cobblemon as an Pokemon
body:
A datapack for all the Alien 1979 fans
This datapack let you catch

Scorpeg
Bug Poison
the Facehugger

Chestworm
Dark Poison
the Chestbuster

Xenorena
Dark Poison
the Xenomorph


Have fun to catch and train your own Xenomorph with this Addon

You need to install the Addon as Datapack and Resourcpack together.
Otherwise it will not work
